message:
feat(input): add full modifier support for all keys

- Add KeyInput struct with key and modifiers fields
- Parse modifiers from Kitty keyboard protocol (shift/ctrl/alt)
- Convert to CDP modifiers format (8=shift, 2=ctrl, 1=alt, 4=meta)
- Pass modifiers through to browser for all special keys
- Enable Shift+Tab, Shift+Arrow (selection), Ctrl+Arrow (word nav)
